projectDescription: FreeRDP is a free, open-source implementation of the Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) providing a cross-platform C library, multiple client frontends (X11, SDL, Wayland, Windows, macOS, Android, iOS), server components (proxy, shadow), and the WinPR Windows portability runtime.
keyFeatures: Full Apache-licensed RDP client and server library in C
Multi-platform client frontends: X11, SDL2/3, Wayland, Windows, macOS, Android, iOS
Shadow server for local desktop screen-sharing over RDP
Pluggable RDP proxy with module system for inspection/modification
30+ virtual channel plugins: clipboard, audio, graphics pipeline, drive/printer/smartcard redirection, USB, camera
WinPR (Windows Portability Runtime) providing Win32 API compatibility on Linux/macOS/Android
Codec support: H.264 (OpenH264/FFmpeg), RemoteFX, NSCodec, ClearCodec, JPEG
Flexible WLog logging system with multiple appenders and runtime configuration
RDP settings system with 3-tier lifecycle (initial config, capability exchange, merged)
Support for NLA/TLS/RDP/Kerberos authentication and FIDO2/WebAuthn
publicApiSurface: WinPR: CreateThread, WaitForSingleObject, RegOpenKeyEx, CreateFile (Win32 compat)
WLog: WLog_GetRoot(), WLog_SetLevel(), WLOG_* environment variables
